title: OpenItemPuller
description: Endlessly looking for your items? Well search no more, OIP can find them in a few clicks!
body:
# OpenItemPuller

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pHaO0sO9Cjo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features
- Easy to use menu
- Modifiable pull range
- Item searching
- Named chest compatible
- S+ like UI
- Server-configurable maximum pull range
- Multiple sorting modes
- Available items only setting

## Requirements
- Fabric-api
- Mod needs to be installed both server & client side to work!
